title: Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri
tagline: Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Our Lady of Good Health Church is a Roman Catholic church situated in Mathigiri, a suburban area adjacent to Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Our Lady of Good Health Church is a Roman Catholic church situated in Mathigiri, a suburban area adjacent to Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. According to Catholic Missionary records, Mathigiri holds a rich historical significance due to the presence of M.E.P Fathers who established settlements in the early 19th century. This is considered to be the mother parish church of Hosur and Denkanikottai belt. Now this servers under the jurisdiction of Dharmapuri Diocese.

topPlaces.name: Mathigiri
topPlaces.description: Mathigiri is a neighborhood in Hosur in Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Achettipalli
topPlaces.description: Achettipalli is a village in the Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Church, Hosur
topPlaces.description: Sacred Heart Church is a Roman Catholic Parish church located in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. It falls under the jurisdiction of the Diocese of Dharmapuri.

topPlaces.name: Hosur taluk
topPlaces.description: Hosur taluka is a taluka of Krishnagiri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the City of Hosur.

topPlaces.name: Kenilworth Fort
topPlaces.description: Kenilworth Fort or Kenilworth Castle is situated in Hosur in the present day Krishnagiri district in the state of Tamil Nadu in India. Its architecture is based on that of Kenilworth Castle in England, making it probably the only fort in India built to resemble an English castle.

topPlaces.name: Chandra Choodeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Chandra Choodeswarar Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located on a rocky hill in the city of Hosur, Krishnagiri District, Tamil Nadu. Due to variations in the local languages (Tamil, Kannada, Telugu) and dialects, the temple is also referred to as 'Chandira Choodeshwarar', 'Chandra Choodeshwara', 'Chandra Choodeshwar', 'Shri Choodeswarar' or 'Arulmigu Chandra Choodeshwarar'.

topPlaces.name: Kothagondapalli
topPlaces.description: Kothagondapalli is a village in the Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Hosur division
topPlaces.description: Hosur division is a revenue division in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (57 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (40 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Good Health Church, Mathigiri?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mathigiri, Achettipalli, Sacred Heart Church, Hosur, Hosur taluk, Kenilworth Fort.
